_meta.fetchedBy: Claude — direct fetch of EIA Today in Energy article on fuel cells

primarySources.type: EIA Today in Energy — 'Fuel cell power plants are used in diverse ways across the United States'
primarySources.underlyingData: EIA-860 (Annual Electric Generator Report) and EIA-923 (Monthly Power Plant Report), 2016 reporting year

primarySources.type: EIA Form 860 — Annual Electric Generator Report (raw data)
primarySources.extractionStatus: URL identified; the actual generator file (xlsx) is too large to fetch directly. User-machine download + Excel filter (technology = Fuel cells) is the next step to derive the *current* US fuel-cell total.

primarySources.type: DOE Hydrogen and Fuel Cell Technologies Office

_meta.confidence: high (2016 baseline 권위 + 2024 권위 — 둘 다 EIA-860 직접 추출)
_meta.verificationNote: 2016 baseline (EIA Today in Energy 인용) + 2024 권위 수치 (EIA-860 2024 ZIP 직접 다운로드 → Prime Mover='FC' 필터, 2026-05-29 사용자 컴퓨터에서 스크립트 실행 완료). 단일 권위 데이터로 미국 fuel cell fleet 확정. 결과 별도 파일 data/fuelcells/eia860-2024-fuelcells.json (186 generators / 363.8 MW total).

authoritative_current_state_2024._source: EIA-860 2024 ZIP 직접 다운로드 + Prime Mover='FC' 필터 (scripts/fetch-eia860-fuelcells.js, 2026-05-29 실행)

growth_vs_2016_baseline._interpretation: 8년간 fleet 2.65x 성장. 그러나 US 전체 발전 capacity 1,150+ GW 대비 여전히 *0.03% 미만*. 데이터센터 BTM wave는 *방향성* 신호이지 *규모* 신호는 아직 아님.

geographic_concentration_2024._interpretation: CA + CT + NY = 86.5% (2016에는 CA + CT + DE = 85%). *NY가 DE 대체로 3위에 부상* — Yaphank Fuel Cell Park, Generate Colchester 등 IPP-developed SPV가 NY에 등장. NY 정책 incentive 확장의 양적 증거. 우리 도구의 주별 우선순위에 NY 추가 필요.

top_operators_MW._interpretation: Operator 상위 6 = 68.4%. *Bloom 직접 + Bloom SPV들(2016 ESA, Diamond State, 일부 다른)이 압도적*. Bridgeport·Derby는 FuelCell Energy (FCEL, NYSE) MCFC 사이트. → FC-003 발견 'EIA가 공시 억제하는 이유 = Bloom 독점'의 *정량적 검증*.

annual_BOL_recent_10yr._definition: Begin Operation Date 기준 신규 추가 MW (해당 연도)
annual_BOL_recent_10yr._pattern: 2017-2020 강력한 성장기 (40+ MW/yr). 2021-2024 *둔화* (5.5-34 MW/yr). 그러나 Bloom의 2024 AEP 1 GW announcement는 2025-2027 BOL 예정으로 EIA-860 2024에는 아직 미반영. → *진짜 wave는 EIA-860 2025/2026 release에서 가시화*. 우리 도구의 'AI 데이터센터 BTM wave는 *2025-2028에 EIA-860 데이터에 잡힐 것*' 예측 명시 가능.

magnitude_context._interpretation: *Bloom의 AEP 단일 announcement = 전국 fleet의 2.75배*. 1-2개 데이터센터 거래가 시장을 변형시킬 수 있는 시점. 이게 우리가 도구를 만드는 정량적 이유.

context.background: US-installed fuel cells include stationary CHP (combined heat & power), prime-power for data centers/commercial, and backup. Bloom Energy SOFCs are the largest commercial fleet; FuelCell Energy (FCEL) operates molten-carbonate fuel cells (MCFC) — Bridgeport·Derby sites. Doosan/PAFC have a smaller US presence. Historic concentration: CA, CT, DE — RPS programs recognizing fuel cells as eligible distributed generation. 2024 update: NY emerges as 3rd state with IPP-developed SPV projects.
context.scale: Authoritative 2016 baseline (137 MW) → authoritative 2024 (363.8 MW). 2.65x growth in 8 years. Bloom's 2024 AEP 1 GW announcement alone = 2.75x existing US fleet. The AI data-center BTM wave is directionally clear but the bulk of installations will appear in EIA-860 2025/2026 releases as backlog converts to BOL.

authoritative_baseline_2016._source: EIA Today in Energy article (April 2018), based on EIA-860 Annual Electric Generator Report for 2016 reporting year
authoritative_baseline_2016.definitionNote: Includes generators ≥1 MW nameplate. Excludes distributed (<1 MW) units, which are numerous in commercial buildings.
authoritative_baseline_2016.growth_pace: 85% of 2016 capacity came online since 2013 — strong growth trajectory even at small absolute scale

fuel_mix._note: Even biogas-fired fuel cells qualify for some state RPS programs (CT, DE, others)

capacity_factor_distribution.low_below_30pct: 8 of 50 plants — typical of peak shaving / backup
capacity_factor_distribution.high_above_85pct: ~25% of plants — typical of primary power
capacity_factor_distribution._interpretation: Bimodal CF distribution: plants are either base-load primary power (high CF) or peak/backup (low CF). The data-center BTM use case lines up with the high-CF primary-power cluster.

geographic_concentration_2016._interpretation: Three states accounted for 85% of US fuel-cell capacity in 2016 — driven by state RPS programs that recognize fuel cells (including those on natural gas) as eligible distributed generation. This is the policy footprint that has shaped the geography.

triangulation_for_current_state._note: We don't have the current US total from EIA-860 2024 yet, but we can triangulate from vendor disclosures
triangulation_for_current_state.Bloom_Energy_cumulative_global_MW_byEnd2: Exceeds 1 GW (1,000+ MW) per Bloom IR materials; US share unstated but historically majority

Bloom_Energy_2024_announcements_US_alone.AEP: 1 GW commitment over multi-year period; 100 MW initial order
Bloom_Energy_2024_announcements_US_alone._note: These are 2024 announcements (not all yet installed) — but they signal that annual flow now exceeds the entire 2016 stock

triangulation_for_current_state.implied_current_US_fleet: 300-700 MW operating + 1+ GW in announced backlog (high uncertainty range — needs EIA-860 2024 verification)

open_questions_for_followup: Download EIA-860 2024 (released 2025-09-09), filter Schedule 3 Generator table by Prime Mover = 'FC' (Fuel Cells), sum nameplate capacity — this gives the authoritative current US total
Same EIA-860 file gives state-level breakdown, operator name, in-service date for each generator — substantial signal for our deployment map
EIA-923 monthly generation data — actual capacity factors for current operating fleet
Bloom Energy 10-K segment disclosure — US vs international cumulative deployment breakdown
Recent (2023-2024) EIA Today in Energy refresh articles on fuel cells, if any
